settings.darkThemeHint: Background image is hidden in dark theme.

settings.clearSuccess: All app data has been deleted.

permissions.mediaLibraryDenied: Access denied. Allow gallery in device settings.
permissions.contactsDenied: Access denied. Allow contacts in device settings.

location.permissionDenied: Location permission denied. Allow access in settings or enter coordinates manually.

contactsService.noAccessPickMessage: Allow contacts access in device settings to pick a companion from your phone book.
contactsService.noAccessMessage: Allow contacts access in device settings.
